title: arisaema triphyllum f. pusillum
intro: Arisaema triphyllum f. pusillum, also known as the dwarf green dragon or small green dragon, is a subspecies of the Jack-in-the-pulpit plant, characterized by its smaller size and unique green coloration. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may be used to treat conditions such as arthritis and gout. Arisaema triphyllum f. pusillum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, although caution should be exercised when handling and consuming the plant due to its potential toxicity.
